creator: bsd@dino.sk
text:
I tried recently some upgrade, one of them failed - it was on 8.4-STABLE i386 from clamav-0.98.4_1 to clamav-0.98.4_2.

gmake[3]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/security/clamav/work/clamav-0.98.4/unit_tests'

All other upgrades went smoothly.
